Locations

Berlin / Tokyo

INTERIOR / ARCHITECTURE / RESEARCH

WE SHAPE SILENCE

EST. 2012 / ATELIER MONOLITH COORDINATES: 52.5200° N, 13.4050° E
01 / PHILOSOPHY

The Art of Reduction

We believe that architectural quality is not achieved by adding details, but by removing everything that is non-essential. Space is defined not by the walls that enclose it, but by the light, shadows, and materials that dwell within.

Atelier Monolith operates at the intersection of modern minimalism and raw brutalist materiality. Our designs respond to context, gravity, and the flow of time. We craft monolithic residences, cultural hubs, and spatial installations that evoke emotion through structural purity.

Discuss a Project
02 / SELECTED WORKS

Monolithic Expressions
01 RESIDENTIAL / SWITZERLAND

Villa Nebula

A subterranean brutalist concrete retreat embedded in the rocky slopes of the Swiss Alps, capturing mountain views through raw framed portals.
02 CULTURAL / KYOTO

Shadow Pavilion

A zen-inspired pavilion constructed of charred cedar and blackened steel, reflecting the shifting patterns of bamboo shadows.
03 RESIDENTIAL / NORWAY

The Monolith Cliff

A dramatic cantilevered structure projecting out over a dark fjord, blurring the lines between geological formation and architecture.
04 GALLERY / TOKYO

Aether Gallery

A monolithic exhibition hall with an overhead concrete skylight, generating sharp geometric light plays throughout the seasons.

03 / THE STUDIO

Shaping the Form

Founded in 2012 by architects Hans Klemens and Yua Sato, Atelier Monolith has grown into a collaborative workspace of 18 designers, engineers, and researchers. With studios in Berlin and Tokyo, our works span Europe and Asia, sharing a common vision of architectural silence.

0 Global Awards
0 Completed Works
0 Countries Active
0 Publications

Selected Recognition

  • 2025 Mies van der Rohe Nominee Villa Nebula
  • 2023 AIA Honor Award for Architecture Shadow Pavilion
  • 2021 German Design Award Gold The Monolith Cliff
